title: KAMECON
description: KAMECON is an annual anime convention held at the University of Maryland in the Stamp Student Union and is open to the public. First held in 2017, the convention made its long awaited return in Fall 2025, welcoming over 700 attendees. The event featured a live concert, artist and vendor alley, cosplay competition, gaming hall, and many other exciting activities. With KAMECON's successful comeback, plans are already underway for KAMECON 2026, stay tuned for more updates!
